title: What if Asuka and Shinjis positions were switched in EoE
display_title: What if Asuka and Shinjis positions were switched in EoE
wikitext:
[]: What if Asuka and Shinji's positions were switched in EoE?             Quote Post by offthechainjoe » Sat Jan 02, 2010 2:46 pm Imagine there's some kind of random twist in the space time continuum!! And during the fight with Arael, somehow instead of Asuka, Shinji gets mind-raped and becomes all super, mega depressed and catatonic... How do you think this switch would effect the remaining episodes onward and EoE?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Jan 02, 2010 2:52 pm Actually that sounds like it would be a very interesting turn of events.

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Sat Jan 02, 2010 2:54 pm I might have said "Screw This" & turned it off in disgust over the fact that Asuka, once again, has whored over yet more screentime & being an all-around bitch towards everyone & lamented that poor Shinji is now a vegetable actually, I might have kept watching, but I dunno. It depends on what actual route the series would have rent if EVA went like that in its final stages

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Jan 02, 2010 3:08 pm I would say you would get the fic Erishiumu kara no Shoujo (Daughter of Elysium) -- except that the author seemed not to believe in anything after episode 24'. EoE with Shinji stuffed into EVA-01 from the get-go would have cut out all of him failing even to be a whiny bitch, and go straight to where Yui would ascend to run a Trojan on the SEELE ritual. I would plug my own fic at this point but that assumes an alternative pilot in EVA-01, with Shinji just as sedated cargo at the EoE stage. And Rei getting the benefit of Arael's attack.

[]: FINALLY! A decent "What if" discussion!!!             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Jan 02, 2010 3:32 pm For what it's worth, Shinji WAS going to be the one mind-raped by (I guess Arael) in Proposal, but according to the episode summaries, I believe it was under the assumption Asuka was injured in a previous episode and he wanted to prove himself to her. I could be getting my Proposal episodes mixed up, but yeah. Keeping in mind it's just a game, if the Eva2 game is anything to go by in terms of what Shinji SEES during the mind-rape (Rei's the only one who can't be affected because somebody needs to go and get the Spear), he starts screaming about how he doesn't want Gendo to abandon him and is all in denial about how Yui's in Eva-01. (For those curious, Asuka more or less reacts similarly to episode 22. Kaworu freaks out about really being Adam or some such thing and Toji's all upset that his dad & grandfather are the only one's around and says how he misses his mother. He might say something about his little sister too but I forget what.) Anyway, that would have been a really interesting twist if Shinji was the one to have the downward spiral and Asuka managed to stay more or less sane considering her will-power. While I doubt she could have somehow defeated the MP Eva series in that case (she sure as hell couldn't in EoE even with Kyoko's help), my guess is Instrumentality would have ended somewhat quicker due to Asuka maintaining her strong will of wanting to live had it still played out like EoE. IF Lilith and Adam would have still tried to help out the distressed Shinji like the prelude to 3rd Impact/Instrumentality, at the same time, Shinji would have probably been a lot bitter about everything ("Everybody just die") DURING pre-Instrumentality sooner instead of just being suicidally depressed. Though it makes me wonder, under the assumption that he would still stay in Hakone/Nerv like during the Bitter End arc, would he have still had what it took to kill Kaworu as he did in the series? Or would there have been some type of spin on Asuka being the one to do it, thus creating more complications between Asuka and Shinji's relationship, whether or not Asuka would attempt to support Shinji or still let her pride get in the way of offering help? There's also the fact that Asuka having her act together might have been enough to save Rei 2 from dying, which in itself would have put some kind of drama with whether or not Rei would still go along with Gendo's Instrumentality or still rush to Shinji's aid... These are all very interesting points to consider at any rate. And while some of the extra-canon games like the Ayanami with Asuka Raising Project touch upon Rei 2 surviving Armisael due to Asuka's intervention, the events afterward still play out more or less like the series despite being Rei 2 and not 3. Which is a shame in itself, because so much more could have been done with it despite being one of the games (Although there is some alternate ending in the Asuka portion of the game with Nerv being able to avoid the JSSDF attack, but I never got that end so I have no idea what makes it stand out from the series ending).... Oh well.

[]: Re: FINALLY! A decent "What if" discussion!!!             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Jan 02, 2010 3:44 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Shinji WAS going to be the one mind-raped by (I guess Arael) in Proposal... I could be getting my Proposal episodes mixed up, but yeah.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Jan 02, 2010 3:48 pm Right, that's what I was thinking of. Thanks for the link Tines.

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Sat Jan 02, 2010 4:26 pm @ topic: Asuka: "Get off me, you're heavy! Stupid Shinji." Shinji: "Sorry."

[]:             Quote Post by Shackel » Mon Jan 04, 2010 3:23 am Honestly, I think if Shinji was mind-raped both he AND Asuka would immediately be pushed into their EoE states of mind by EoE, but if Shinji woke up in the lake, Yui would go berserk at the beginning, eat at least one of the cores of the MP EVAs, and ruin SEELE's plans. Asuka's mother would act the same as Yui did, allowing Asuka to join in the battle. If the MP Evas died, then it would probably just be the world against Japan, more EVAs may be involved, and maybe even another nuclear war. Hm.

[]:             Quote Post by DevRei17 » Fri Jan 08, 2010 9:52 pm There would be Asuka mayonaise, Aoba would be voiced by a black guy and Asuka would regain her throne as head bitch and choke Shinji.... ...Also hot Asuka on Misato action at the elevator.

[]:             Quote Post by Starasp » Fri Jan 08, 2010 9:56 pm Instead of Tang, there would be Kool-Aid.

[]: Re: What if Asuka and Shinji's positions were switched in Eo             Quote Post by Killericon » Mon Jan 11, 2010 1:41 am offthechainjoe wrote: Imagine...Shinji...becomes all super, mega depressed and catatonic...

[]: Re: What if Asuka and Shinji's positions were switched in Eo             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Jan 11, 2010 1:51 am Killericon wrote: the entirety of the Kaworu saga wouldn't been far more/less interesting with Asuka around instead of Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Fri Jan 15, 2010 6:58 pm interesting, i would have to say that Asuka would get in her eva, kick their asses. then it would be NERV against the world, and Asuka would wake Shinji by playing with his fun tassel, if you know what i mean, and they would have a weird relationship for a good long while. oh, and Asuka would kill kaworu right away for decieving her because we have to assume that he would try to manipulate her like he did Shinji. serves him right for trying to break up the one true pairing.

[]:             Quote Post by konfunoodle » Wed Jan 20, 2010 2:53 am I would enjoy it for the switching of characters for the infamous mayo making and nice kiss scene... X3

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Thu Feb 25, 2010 4:21 pm well, the strangulation scene would have turned into a gag. we all knows what happens when you strangle us guys. yup, that would hhave made things slightly more interesting.

[]:             Quote Post by galacticgalaxy » Sun Feb 28, 2010 7:25 pm Thats a really interesting thought~ I think if that was the case Asuka would definately have took a further plunge into her feelings for Shinji- and perhaps would have made a confession to him or something after the battle.

[]:             Quote Post by Bomby von Bombsville » Sun Feb 28, 2010 7:37 pm I totally thought this topic was going to be about that scene. In which case, that would be a rather interesting scenario.
